calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Setting Aside Dismissal To Obtain Order Substituting Successor-In- Interest For Deceased Plaintiff And Order For Same
Off Calendar Jun-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' Motion for Order Setting Aside Dismissal to Obtain Order Substituting Successor-In-Interest for Deceased Plaintiff is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Brady Dugan is substituted as successor-in-interest for deceased plaintiff, Mickey Dugan. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
